description_long: This is a low-polygon adult male figure dressed in traditional attire, featuring a long tunic with rolled-up sleeves, a sash tied around the waist, and a plaid cloth draped over one shoulder. The figure wears a head covering that fits closely to the scalp, and has a full beard and mustache. The pants are straight and tucked into ankle-high shoes. The overall build is average, with arms relaxed at the sides and hands open. The clothing is simple but includes a distinctive patterned cloth, suggesting cultural or occupational significance. The figure's stance is upright and neutral, suitable for a pedestrian in an urban environment.
description: A low-poly adult male in traditional attire with a tunic, sash, plaid shoulder cloth, and head covering, standing upright. The figure has a beard and wears ankle-high shoes.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full face, beard, head covering, tunic, sash, and plaid cloth draped over the left shoulder.
description_view_1: Left side view highlights the profile of the head covering, beard, and the drape of the plaid cloth down the back.
description_view_2: Rear view displays the back of the head covering, the plaid cloth over the left shoulder, and the sash tied at the waist.
description_view_3: Right side view shows the profile of the head covering, beard, and the straight fall of the tunic and pants.
attribute_clothing_type: long tunic with rolled sleeves, waist sash, and draped shoulder cloth
